non_blocking_issues: Contention note (non-defect): handleIdleAlert holds idleMutex across the Main.immediate hop; under main-thread starvation the mutex can be held for seconds, delaying prune side-effects/bridge publishes (suspended queuing, no ANR, low-frequency).
200-coroutine stress test models the two critical sections at pattern level, not the production ALM/bridge wiring (verified by inspection); not a deterministic reproducer of v2 unlocked code.
Carried r2: no Robolectric tests for activeNotifications-guard / foreground-cancel; best-effort persistence windows by design (self-heal).
notes: Confirmed the afterPrune->loop window missed in r2 is real and closed by v3'; both orderings traced against code; no deadlock; ABA generation fence still holds under the Mutex; decision isolated; r1 busy->idle regression remains closed; Bug-2 logs / NotificationDedup internals / foreground cancel unchanged.
